description: Style Note Comfortable shorts made of soft cotton fabric from hanes - this is just what you want to be wearing when relaxing at home. The print adds a little colour and ensures that you'll be looking good, even when chilling at home. Product Details Black and blue printed shorts, has a soft elasticated waistband with a drawstring, brand tag below the waistband and tagless for comfortComes with a string style bikini with a soft waistband that offers a snug Fit, made of combed cottonMaterial and care Rich cottonMachine wash warm Tumble dry low Do not ironSize and Fit Comfort fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size M
